sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after MOUSE on center purple square added white border to purple square
# Let me check the segmentation to see what changed
prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation
prev_nodes = {n['id']:n for n in prev_seg['nodes']}
curr_nodes = {n['id']:n for n in curr_seg['nodes']}
print("Previous nodes:", len(prev_nodes), "Current nodes:", len(curr_nodes))
for nid in curr_nodes:
    if nid not in prev_nodes:
        n = curr_nodes[nid]
        print("New node", nid, ":", n['color'], "pixels=", n['pixels'])
    elif prev_nodes[nid]['color'] != curr_nodes[nid]['color']:
        print("Changed node", nid, ":", prev_nodes[nid]['color'], "->", curr_nodes[nid]['color'])
    elif prev_nodes[nid]['boundary'] != curr_nodes[nid]['boundary']:
        print("Boundary changed for node", nid, ":", prev_nodes[nid]['boundary'], "->", curr_nodes[nid]['boundary'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
